---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new SDK capability, API surface, test target, or production-hardening improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the capability you want.

## Problem

What user need or gap does this solve?

## Proposed Direction

If you have one, describe the rough API or behavior you expect.

## Fluss Context

Is this based on:

- upstream Java client parity
- official Fluss docs
- production usage needs
- demo / E2E gaps

## Additional Context

Links, examples, or tradeoffs to consider.
